Subject: Q3 lab equipment request

Hi procurement,

For the new cell biology lab we need the following before end of Q3:
- 5 x Zeiss microscopes with 40x objective, delivery by 2026-08-15
- 3 x benchtop centrifuges, 15000 rpm

Please raise a sourcing project.

Thanks,
Dr. Meyer
